title: Lepisorus sublinearis
taxonomy: Lepisorus sublinearis belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, which is a family of ferns. It is classified within the genus Lepisorus, a genus of ferns commonly found in Asia. Lepisorus sublinearis is further classified as a species of the genus Lepisorus, and it is native to specific regions in Asia. The classification of Lepisorus sublinearis is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and size. Lepisorus sublinearis is a species of epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants.
